Article URL: https://help.atome.ph/hc/en-gb/articles/8712898781593-What-is-Atome-card What is Atome card? – Atome PH Skip to main content Articles in this section What is Atome card? What are physical and virtual cards? Can I get both virtual and physical cards? What documents do I need to provide when applying for an Atome Card? How can I check the status of my application? Why did my Card application fail? What's next after my card has been approved? How to apply for a physical card? What is the physical card delivery time? How do I activate my card? See more The Atome Card is designed to offer flexible payment solutions and seamless shopping experiences, combining the power of a prepaid card with Buy Now, Pay Later (BNPL) facilities. The Buy Now, Pay Later (BNPL) services, including the ability to split purchases into 3 or 6 equal monthly payments or enjoy up to 40 days of interest-free repayment, are provided exclusively by Atome. The Atome Card operates as a prepaid card and is backed by Asia United Bank, ensuring secure and reliable payment processing. How to Apply: Applying for your Atome Card is simple and hassle-free. Download the Atome app, complete the quick application process, and start enjoying the benefits of flexible, interest-free payments today. Related articles How do I apply for an Atome Cash Loan? What documents do I need to provide when applying for an Atome Card? Can I use my card for ATM Cash Advance? What are physical and virtual cards? Can I get both virtual and physical cards? See more The virtual card is ready to use as soon as it’s approved, and can be used for online purchases at merchants that accept Mastercard. The physical card will be available after delivery and activation. It works for both online and in-store transactions at merchants that accept Mastercard. See more Yes, you can apply for both a virtual and physical card. They are managed separately, so each card has its own number. Please note that the spending limit is shared between both cards. See more Your identity card (ID) will be the sole documentation needed for your Atome card application. List of IDs we accept: National ID Social Security System (SSS) Unified Multi-purpose ID (UMID) Driver's License Passport We believe that with no minimum income requirement and zero tedious paperwork, a fuss-free application will earn us loyal customers! See more We understand your anticipation after applying for Atome card. You may always check the application status via the 'Home & Bills' tab in your Atome app. We will also be sending you an SMS and email once the application result is available. For any further questions, click here to learn how to contact our Customer Support Team. Related articles What is the physical card delivery time? How do I apply for an Atome Cash Loan? Article URL: https://help.atome.ph/hc/en-gb/articles/43466854486681-Why-did-my-Card-application-fail Why did my Card application fail? – Atome PH Skip to main content Articles in this section What is Atome card? What are physical and virtual cards? Can I get both virtual and physical cards? What documents do I need to provide when applying for an Atome Card? How can I check the status of my application? Why did my Card application fail? What's next after my card has been approved? How to apply for a physical card? What is the physical card delivery time? How do I activate my card? See more Your application may not have been approved for a variety of reasons. If you'd like to know the specific reason, please follow the steps below to check your application status. You can check your application status by following these steps: Open the Atome app. Go to the Home tab at the bottom. Tap on the Card tab. Depending on your application status: If your application is still under review, you will see the latest status. If your application is unsuccessful, you’ll be directed to a result page with further details. If your application is approved, you’ll be directed to the Card Management page, where you can view and manage your Atome Card. For unsuccessful applications, you may reapply once you meet the eligibility criteria. Related articles What documents do I need to provide when applying for an Atome Card? Can I use my Atome card abroad? Can I apply for a supplementary card? Can I use my card for ATM Cash Advance? Can I transfer money from my Atome card to a bank account? Do you charge any fee for Atome card? The Atome virtual card is instantly ready for online transactions upon approval and works seamlessly at all online merchants that accept Mastercard worldwide. The Atome physical card can be used on both online and in-store payments worldwide after you activate your card successfully. It is accepted at all merchants that support Mastercard globally.
